title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
